stemHtml:
Refer to figure or ALICANTE - Chart 10-2B from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
You are cruising at FL240. Following the VLC 2N STAR procedure, at what ground distance from the Initial Approach Fix (IAF) are you required to begin descent to reach VALENCIA (VLC) at FL80, if the average rate of descent is 1000 ft/min and the True Airspeed is 338 kt with a headwind component of 20 kt?
